response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial initiative through his open-source work, he lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise required for a Director-level Principal AI Strategy role. His exposure to artificial intelligence appears limited to very recent, hands-on implementation rather than long-term strategic platform development, and he lacks experience advising strategic enterprise customers on AI adoption.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and embedded domains.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Strong track record of technical evangelism, hosting workshops, and speaking at conferences.
concerns: Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
AI experience is highly recent and tactical, missing the recognized, strategic AI leadership expected at a Director level.
No demonstrated experience in advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI technology adoption.
